text:
XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <screen id="screen-000"><header><button action="save" kind="primary" label="Save"/></header><body><field id="email-field" type="text" required="true" label="Email"/></body></screen>
Expectation: every button must have an id ending in -btn.
Fix: {"attr":"id","op":"set_attr","path":"/screen/header/button","value":"save-btn"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <screen id="screen-000"><header></header><body><button id="save-btn" action="save" kind="primary" label="Save"/><field id="email-field" type="text" required="true" label="Email"/></body></screen>
Expectation: buttons belong under header before body fields.
Fix: {"op":"move","path":"/screen/body/button[@id='save-btn']","to":"/screen/header"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <screen id="screen-001"><header><button id="save-btn" action="save" kind="secondary" label="Save"/></header><body><field id="name-field" type="email" required="true" label="Name"/></body></screen>
Expectation: change the visible field label to Customer Name.
Fix: {"attr":"label","op":"set_attr","path":"/screen/body/field[@id='name-field']","value":"Customer Name"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <screen id="screen-002"><header><button id="save-btn" action="save" kind="danger" label="Save"/></header><body><field id="age-field" type="blob" required="true" label="Age"/></body></screen>
Expectation: field age-field should use type number.
Fix: {"attr":"type","op":"set_attr","path":"/screen/body/field[@id='age-field']","value":"number"}
###

XML: <screen id="screen-003"><header><button id="save-btn" action="save" kind="loud" label="Save"/></header><body><field id="status-field" type="select" required="true" label="Status"/></body></screen>
Expectation: button kind must be primary, secondary, or danger.
Fix: {"attr":"kind","op":"set_attr","path":"/screen/header/button[@id='save-btn']","value":"primary"}
###

XML: <form id="form-055"><header><button action="cancel" kind="secondary" label="Cancel"/></header><body><field id="status-field" type="select" required="true" label="Status"/></body></form>
Expectation: every button must have an id ending in -btn.
Fix: {"attr":"id","op":"set_attr","path":"/form/header/button","value":"cancel-btn"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <form id="form-055"><header></header><body><button id="cancel-btn" action="cancel" kind="secondary" label="Cancel"/><field id="status-field" type="select" required="true" label="Status"/></body></form>
Expectation: buttons belong under header before body fields.
Fix: {"op":"move","path":"/form/body/button[@id='cancel-btn']","to":"/form/header"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <form id="form-056"><header><button id="delete-btn" action="delete" kind="danger" label="Delete"/></header><body><field id="email-field" type="text" required="true" label="Email"/></body></form>
Expectation: change the visible field label to Customer Email.
Fix: {"attr":"label","op":"set_attr","path":"/form/body/field[@id='email-field']","value":"Customer Email"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <form id="form-057"><header><button id="delete-btn" action="delete" kind="primary" label="Delete"/></header><body><field id="name-field" type="blob" required="true" label="Name"/></body></form>
Expectation: field name-field should use type email.
Fix: {"attr":"type","op":"set_attr","path":"/form/body/field[@id='name-field']","value":"email"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <form id="form-058"><header><button id="delete-btn" action="delete" kind="loud" label="Delete"/></header><body><field id="age-field" type="number" required="true" label="Age"/></body></form>
Expectation: button kind must be primary, secondary, or danger.
Fix: {"attr":"kind","op":"set_attr","path":"/form/header/button[@id='delete-btn']","value":"secondary"}
###

XML schema: UIFlow.v1
XML: <form id="form-059"><header><button id="delete-btn" action="submit" kind="danger" label="Delete"/></header><body><field id="status-field" type="select" required="true" label="Status"/></body></form>
Expectation: button delete-btn should trigger delete.
Fix: {"attr":"action","op":"set_attr","path":"/form/header/button[@id='delete-btn']","value":"delete"}
